name: Duchess Potato Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Lightly butter a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
3. In a medium saucepan, heat water, margarine, and salt over high heat until boiling.
4. Remove from heat and stir in milk and potato flakes.
5. Blend in the egg, sour cream, and shredded cheddar cheese (1/2 cup) thoroughly.
6. Scoop or spoon the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 20-30 minutes, until lightly golden brown and puffed.
8. Refrigerate leftovers.
